property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Apache Software Foundation\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11\bin;C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\sf\bin;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid email and password", "Open Cart Login Module"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Browser set: edge | Thread ID: 32 Browser set: chrome | Thread ID: 31
Scenario: Login with valid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:3
Scenario: Login with valid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab() Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab() Entered email Entered email Entered password Entered password Selected login button ✔ When User enters valid email and password and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_email_and_password_and_click_on_sign_in() Selected login button ✔ When User enters valid email and password and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_email_and_password_and_click_on_sign_in() My account setting displayed My account setting displayed My orders setting displayed ✔ Then User navigated to users account homepage and verified the page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_navigated_to_users_account_homepage_and_verified_the_page() My orders setting displayed ✔ Then User navigated to users account homepage and verified the page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_navigated_to_users_account_homepage_and_verified_the_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid email and password", "Open Cart Login Module"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:14 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_my_account_tab() Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered email Entered email Entered password Entered password Selected login button ✔ When User enters invalid "yog@gmail.com" and "Yog@123" and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_and_and_click_on_sign_in(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Getting warning message ✔ Then User will get the Error message # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_will_get_the_error_message() Selected login button ✔ When User enters invalid "yog@gmail.com" and "Yog@123" and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_and_and_click_on_sign_in(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Getting warning message ✔ Then User will get the Error message # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_will_get_the_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register user with valid Details", "Open Cart Registration Module"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register user with valid Details # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:8 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_account_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Selected My account tab Entered confirm password ✔ When User enter all necessary details # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enter_all_necessary_details() Clicked privacy policy check box Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_account_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password ✔ When User enter all necessary details # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enter_all_necessary_details() Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ And Click checkbox and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_checkbox_and_click_on_continue() Clicked continue ✔ And Click checkbox and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_checkbox_and_click_on_continue() Account created successfully ✔ Then User successfully registered and verify successful account creation # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_successfully_registered_and_verify_successful_account_creation()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register User with existing email", "Open Cart Registration Module"](7)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register User with existing email # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:20 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered firstname Selected My account tab Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_account_tab() Clicked privacy policy check box Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password Clicked continue ✔ When User enters all updated details but used existing "yoge@gmail.com" # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_all_updated_details_but_used_existing(java.lang.String) Email Alredy existed message displyed ✔ Then Click continue and verify warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_continue_and_verify_warning_message() Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User enters all updated details but used existing "yoge@gmail.com" # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_all_updated_details_but_used_existing(java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify mandatory field validation messages # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:23 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_my_account_tab() No Details entered and clicked continue Clicked privacy policy check box Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_my_account_tab() No Details entered and clicked continue Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User not entered any details and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_not_entered_any_details_and_click_on_continue() Firstname required error message displayed Lastname required error message displayed Email required error message displayed Phone no required error message displayed Password required error message displayed ✔ Then User gets a warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_a_warning_message() Clicked continue ✔ When User not entered any details and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_not_entered_any_details_and_click_on_continue() Firstname required error message displayed Lastname required error message displayed

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify password mismatch validation", "Open Cart Registration Module"](10)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify password mismatch validation # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:28 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab() Entered password Entered firstname Entered confirm password Entered lastname Entered email Clicked privacy policy check box Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User entered all details but used two different passwords and click continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_entered_all_details_but_used_two_different_passwords_and_click_continue() Password mismatch error message displayed ✔ Then User gets the Password mismatch error message and verify # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_the_password_mismatch_error_message_and_verify() Clicked continue ✔ When User entered all details but used two different passwords and click continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_entered_all_details_but_used_two_different_passwords_and_click_continue() Password mismatch error message displayed ✔ Then User gets the Password mismatch error message and verify # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_the_password_mismatch_error_message_and_verify()

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using valid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](11)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:9 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected login option Selected My account tab Entered email Entered password Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() iMac name send to check box iMac name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iMac" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iMac" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) iMac Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iMac" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String) iMac Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iMac" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:10 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:10 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login option Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() iPhone name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iPhone" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) iPhone name send to check box iPhone Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iPhone" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String) Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iPhone" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](16)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add product to cart # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and logged into account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_logged_into_account() Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password iMac name send to check box Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and logged into account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_logged_into_account() Clicked search button ✔ When User search for product and get the product results # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_search_for_product_and_get_the_product_results() ✔ And User selected the product and navigated to product page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_the_product_and_navigated_to_product_page() Add to cart button clicked iMac name send to check box Product Added to cart, success message displayed ✔ Then User selected Add to cart button and verify product added to cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_add_to_cart_button_and_verify_product_added_to_cart()

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](16)

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update product quantity # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:9 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on open cart homepage and logged in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_open_cart_homepage_and_logged_in_to_account() Selected login button ✔ Given User is on open cart homepage and logged in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_open_cart_homepage_and_logged_in_to_account() Selected shopping cart option ✔ When User select Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_select_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() clicked on quanity text box cleared existing quantity update quantity to 2 clicked update cart button ✔ And User updates the quantity of product # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_updates_the_quantity_of_product() Quantity successfully updated to: 2 ✔ Then Verify price changes and quantity updated # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_price_changes_and_quantity_updated()

testcase.name: runScenario["Update product quantity", "Open Cart cart Module"](17)

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Checkout functionality", "Open Cart Checkout Feature"](20)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify Checkout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature5_Checkout.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button hp name send to check box hp name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ Given User login to account and search for a product # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_login_to_account_and_search_for_a_product() Clicked search button ✔ Given User login to account and search for a product # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_login_to_account_and_search_for_a_product() Add to cart button clicked ✔ When User select product and added to cart # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_select_product_and_added_to_cart() Add to cart button clicked ✔ When User select product and added to cart # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_select_product_and_added_to_cart() Selected shopping cart option Selected shopping cart option ✔ And User went to cart page and click on checkout button # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_went_to_cart_page_and_click_on_checkout_button() ✔ And User went to cart page and click on checkout button # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_went_to_cart_page_and_click_on_checkout_button() User is on billing details section User is on billing details section User is on delivery details section User is on delivery details section ✔ And User enters billing details and delivery details # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_billing_details_and_delivery_details() ✔ And User enters billing details and delivery details # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_billing_details_and_delivery_details() User is on billing section User is on billing section User is on payment method section User is on payment method section User is on confirm order section User is on confirm order section ✔ And User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order() ✔ And User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order() Order confirmation message displayed ✔ Then User get the order confirmation message # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_get_the_order_confirmation_message() Order confirmation message displayed ✔ Then User get the order confirmation message # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_get_the_order_confirmation_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Checkout functionality", "Open Cart Checkout Feature"](20)

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify logout functionality", "Open Cart Logout Module"](21)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify logout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature6_Logout.feature:3 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login option Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and logins to account # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_logins_to_account() Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and logins to account # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_logins_to_account() ✔ When Select My Account Option and click on Logout option # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.select_my_account_option_and_click_on_logout_option() ✔ When Select My Account Option and click on Logout option # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.select_my_account_option_and_click_on_logout_option() User Logged out successfully ✔ And User logged out from account and verify session termination # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logged_out_from_account_and_verify_session_termination() User Logged out successfully ✔ And User logged out from account and verify session termination # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logged_out_from_account_and_verify_session_termination() User successfully navigated to homepage after logout ✔ Then User click continue to redirect to homepage # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_click_continue_to_redirect_to_homepage() User successfully navigated to homepage after logout ✔ Then User click continue to redirect to homepage # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_click_continue_to_redirect_to_homepage()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify logout functionality", "Open Cart Logout Module"](21)
